inputs.label: Denominator
inputs.businessContext: Bottom part of the fraction (divisor). Must be non-zero.

businessContext_i18n.en: Bottom part of the fraction (divisor). Must be non-zero.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesrin alt kısmı (bölen). Sıfırdan farklı olmalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Unterer Teil des Bruchs (Divisor). Muss ungleich Null sein.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Partie inférieure de la fraction (diviseur). Doit être non nul.
businessContext_i18n.es: Parte inferior de la fracción (divisor). Debe ser distinto de cero.

inputs.label: Whole Number
inputs.businessContext: Whole number part for mixed fractions (optional).

businessContext_i18n.en: Whole number part for mixed fractions (optional).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Karışık kesirler için tam sayı kısmı (isteğe bağlı).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Partie entière pour les fractions mixtes (optionnel).

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places in the final percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places in the final percentage.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen im endgültigen Prozentsatz.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales dans le pourcentage final.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales en el porcentaje final.

inputs.label: Rounding Mode
inputs.businessContext: 0 = standard rounding (half up), 1 = floor, 2 = ceil, 3 = truncate.

businessContext_i18n.en: 0 = standard rounding (half up), 1 = floor, 2 = ceil, 3 = truncate.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 0 = standart yuvarlama (half up), 1 = taban, 2 = tavan, 3 = kesme.
businessContext_i18n.fr: 0 = arrondi standard (demi au supérieur), 1 = plancher, 2 = plafond, 3 = troncature.
businessContext_i18n.es: 0 = redondeo estándar (half up), 1 = suelo, 2 = techo, 3 = truncar.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
